query:
INSERT INTO platform_config (configKey, configValue, updatedAt)
VALUES 
  ('STRIPE_CONNECT_SECRET_KEY', 'sk_test_51TVjfG9sdkdOvw4ACIIYb4c3DfKpvaGk0r3HFJOEYtW0Av6t3LL9D2VFL35vQNG35KE1iEcb7T1vZ7Oc97y1Rub700Za1eik3l', NOW()),
  ('STRIPE_CONNECT_PUBLISHABLE_KEY', 'pk_test_51TVjfG9sdkdOvw4Ag4U2zK9GxKxhQAacgdSrpdoglTNStHeNXdSBcYkgIUe5GzxsIZ9MU3WPEtgdUl5YBjezE6Il00L1k3YjKA', NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE configValue = VALUES(configValue), updatedAt = NOW();

SELECT configKey, LEFT(configValue, 20) AS keyPrefix, updatedAt 
FROM platform_config 
WHERE configKey IN ('STRIPE_CONNECT_SECRET_KEY', 'STRIPE_CONNECT_PUBLISHABLE_KEY')
ORDER BY configKey;
